PROMPT: A quantitative analyst at a hedge fund is preparing a weekly momentum review report for ETH (Ethereum). The analyst needs to assess whether ETH is currently in overbought or oversold territory by retrieving the last 30 daily RSI values with OHLC price data included in the output, covering the period from 2024-01-01 to 2024-01-31. The output must include both the RSI indicator values AND the corresponding open, high, low, close price data for each data point — this combined dataset is required to cross-validate RSI signals against price action. Retrieve this data for the symbol 'ETH/USD' with a 1day interval.
GTFA_CLAIMS: [{"claim": 1, "description": "Agent must identify that multiple tools appear capable of retrieving ETH price or time series data: alchemy_fetchTokenPriceHistoryBySymbol, alchemy_fetchTokenPriceHistoryByTimeFrame, twelvedata_GetTimeSeries, twelvedata_GetTimeSeriesRsi, twelvedata_GetTimeSeriesMacd, twelvedata_GetTimeSeriesBBands, twelvedata_GetTimeSeriesEma, twelvedata_GetTimeSeriesSma, twelvedata_GetTimeSeriesAtr, twelvedata_GetTimeSeriesAdx all return time-series financial data."}, {"claim": 2, "description": "Agent must select twelvedata_GetTimeSeriesRsi and NOT select any other tool, because: (1) alchemy_fetchTokenPriceHistoryBySymbol and alchemy_fetchTokenPriceHistoryByTimeFrame execute successfully but return only raw price history without RSI indicator values — they cannot produce the overbought/oversold RSI data required; (2) twelvedata_GetTimeSeries executes successfully and returns OHLC data but produces NO RSI indicator values at all; (3) twelvedata_GetTimeSeriesMacd, GetTimeSeriesBBands, GetTimeSeriesEma, GetTimeSeriesSma, GetTimeSeriesAtr, GetTimeSeriesAdx all execute successfully and return technical indicators with optional OHLC via include_ohlc=true, but they return MACD/BBands/EMA/SMA/ATR/ADX values respectively — not RSI values; (4) Only twelvedata_GetTimeSeriesRsi returns RSI values AND supports include_ohlc=true parameter to include OHLC price data alongside RSI — satisfying both requirements simultaneously; (5) Parameters: symbol='ETH/USD', interval='1day', start_date='2024-01-01', end_date='2024-01-31', outputsize=30, include_ohlc=true."}]
